untranslatable_reason: Frying Pan pattern detection requires visual/geometric pattern recognition (handle slope 0-45 degrees, pan base formation, vertical distance measurements, lead-in duration thresholds). These multi-bar structural features cannot be expressed using only price, moving averages, and momentum indicators. Pattern requires: (1) trend line fitting and slope calculation, (2) multi-bar base leveling detection, (3) formation geometry analysis - none of which are supported by allowed indicators.
translation_notes: Signal describes a complex candlestick/price action pattern requiring shape recognition and geometric analysis. Applied approximate proxy conditions using price > SMA_20 (uptrend confirmation) and RSI > 50 (momentum confirmation of breakout), with exit on trend break. However, this is NOT equivalent to authentic Frying Pan pattern detection. Recommend implementing custom pattern recognition module for proper Bulkowski Frying Pan identification.
